Longitude of Birth: 122 W 20
Latitude of Birth: 47 N 36
BILL GATES' RASHI CHART
Bill Gates, the world’s richest man and the founder of Microsoft, of course will attribute his
success to his hard work and his parental upbringing. They are true of course, but to some
extent. Bill Gates’ mammoth success has astrological reasons to a very large extent. He has
terrific Raja yoga’s, which is rarely seen in anybody’s chart.
BL
MOON ASCENDANT
KETU
GLK
Rashi Chart
MND
JUPITER
RAHU
SUN
MERCURY
VENUS
MARS
SATURN
His 5th lord in 5th is combined with ninth lord that is exalted, and this combination is termed
as Raja Yoga of high order. According to Maharishi Parashara when two Trikona lords
combine in a Trikona house, it will lead to yoga (luck) that will make the person rich in

unheard levels.
He also has got the dasa of Raja Yoga of Venus for 20 years, which started from 1983 and
runs till 2003. This is the period when he carved his name in the software industry, which
